zh.lifeSummary: Bernard de Brus Lord of Exton and Connington於1215年出生在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾。他於大約1249年與Alice de Beauchamp結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1268年11月22日在英國亨廷格多史爾享年53歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾康寧頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Bernard de Brus Lord of Exton and Connington于1215年出生在英国英格兰坎布利其爾。他于大约1249年与Alice de Beauchamp结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1268年11月22日在英国亨廷格多史爾享年53岁，埋葬在英国英格兰坎布利其爾康寧頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Brus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Polish, Slovenian, Czech, Sorbian, and Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): from Slavic brus ‘whetstone’, presumably a metonymic occupational name for someone who honed or sharpened blades; possibly also a nickname for a clumsy or coarse fellow. Compare Bruss .
Slovenian: from an old dialect short form of the personal name Ambrož (see Ambrose ). Compare Bruss .
French: topographic name for someone living on a heath, from Occitan brusc ‘heather’, or a habitational name from (Le/Les) Brus, the name of several places in southern France.

variants.name: Bruss
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Eldor, Reinhard, Rudie, Wilhelm.
German (also Brüss): from a short form of the medieval personal name Ambrosius (see Ambrose ).
Americanized or Germanized form of Polish, Slovenian, Czech, Sorbian, and Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic)   Brus  , meaning ‘whetstone’ and, as a Slovenian name, also ‘Ambrose’.

nameMeanings.name: Bernard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from ber(n) ‘bear’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. This was the name of three famous medieval churchmen: St Bernard of Menthon ( 923–1008 ), founder of a hospice on each of the Alpine passes named after him; the monastic reformer St Bernard of Clairvaux ( 1090–1153 ); and the scholastic philosopher Bernard of Chartres. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. A native Old English form, Beornheard, was superseded by the Norman form.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: Bernard de Brus Lord of Exton and Connington was born in 1215, in Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom. He married Alice de Beauchamp about 1249. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 22 November 1268, in Huntingdonshire, England, at the age of 53, and was buried in Conington, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Bernard de Brus Lord of Exton and Connington est né en 1215, à Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a épousé Alice de Beauchamp environ 1249. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 22 novembre 1268, à Huntingdonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Conington, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Bernard de Brus Lord of Exton and Connington wurde 1215 in Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom geboren. Er hat um 1249 Alice de Beauchamp geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 22. November 1268 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Huntingdonshire, England und wurde in Conington, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Bernard de Brus Lord of Exton and Connington è nato il nel 1215 nel Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lui sposato Alice de Beauchamp circa 1249. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 22 novembre 1268, nel Huntingdonshire, England, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a Conington, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Bernard de Brus Lord of Exton and Conningtonは1215年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアで生まれた。約1249年にAlice de Beauchampと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1268年11月22日にイギリスハンティングドンシュアイアで53歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアコニントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Bernard de Brus Lord of Exton and Connington(은)는 1215년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르에서 태어났다. 그는 대략 1249년 Alice de Beauchamp(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1268년 11월 22일 영국 헌틴그도실르에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 코닝턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Bernard de Brus Lord of Exton and Connington nasceu em 1215, em Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele casou-se com Alice de Beauchamp aproximadamente 1249. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 22 de novembro de 1268, em Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Conington, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Bernard de Brus Lord of Exton and Connington родился в 1215 г. в местности камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice de Beauchamp около 1249 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 22 ноября 1268 г. в местности хантингдоншир, Англия в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности конингтон, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Bernard de Brus Lord of Exton and Connington nació en 1215, en Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con Alice de Beauchamp aproximadamente 1249. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 22 de noviembre de 1268, en Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en Conington, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
